content.text: The system shall allow users to navigate to the Raw Data page via the path RTSS → Raw Data from the left navigation menu.
navigate to the Raw Data page from the RTSS menu
I can access raw data download functionality
the user is on the application dashboard
the user navigates via RTSS → Raw Data
the system shall open the Raw Data page.

2.title: View Raw Data Module in Navigation

content.text: The system shall provide a Raw Data module under the RTSS navigation menu.
see the Raw Data module under RTSS
the left navigation menu is displayed
the user expands the RTSS menu
the system shall display the Raw Data module option.
The system shall display a page titled “Download Raw Data (CSV)”.
I can confirm I am on the correct screen
the Raw Data page is displayed
the user views the screen header
the system shall display the title “Download Raw Data (CSV)”.
The system shall display the following mandatory input fields: Select MHE, Select Sensor, and Select Date Range.
I can provide required details for data download
the Raw Data page is displayed
the system shall display mandatory fields: Select MHE, Select Sensor, and Select Date Range
The system shall mark mandatory fields using a red asterisk (*) indicator.
mandatory fields to be clearly indicated
I know which fields are required
the system shall display a red asterisk (*) indicator beside required fields.
The system shall provide a dropdown field for selecting the MHE (Material Handling Equipment).
the Raw Data page is displayed
the system shall display a dropdown field for MHE selection.
The system shall display the list of available MHEs in the dropdown, and allow user to select only one MHE at a time.
I can retrieve associated sensor data
the system shall display available MHEs and allow selection of only one MHE at a time.

8.title: Populate Sensor Dropdown Based on MHE

content.text: The system shall populate the Sensor dropdown based on the selected MHE.
sensor options to update based on selected MHE
the system shall populate the Sensor dropdown with mapped sensors.
The system shall retain the selected MHE value until changed by the user.
my selected MHE to remain selected
I don’t need to reselect it
the user continues interacting with the page
the system shall retain the selected MHE value until changed
The system shall provide a dropdown field for selecting the sensor associated with the selected MHE.
I can download relevant raw data
the Raw Data page is displayed
the system shall display a dropdown field for sensor selection

11.title: Disable Sensor Dropdown Until MHE Selection

content.text: The system shall keep the Sensor dropdown disabled until an MHE is selected.
the Sensor field disabled until MHE selection
the user views the Sensor dropdown
the system shall keep the Sensor dropdown disabled.

12.title: Display Sensors Mapped to Selected MHE

content.text: The system shall display only sensors mapped to the selected MHE.
the user opens the Sensor dropdown
the system shall display only sensors mapped to the selected MHE.
The system shall allow the user to select one sensor at a time.
the system shall allow selection of only one sensor at a time.
The system shall provide a date range picker for selecting the raw data download period.
I can define the download period
the user views the Date Range field
the system shall provide a date range picker.

15.title: Disable Date Range Until Sensor Selection

content.text: The system shall keep the Date Range field disabled until a sensor is selected.
the Date Range field disabled initially
the user views the Date Range field
the system shall keep the Date Range field disabled.
The system shall allow users to select both start date and end date.
I define the required data period
the Date Range picker is enabled
the system shall allow selection of both start and end date.
The system shall display the selected date range in the format: MMM DD, YYYY - MMM DD, YYYY.
start and end dates are selected
the system shall display the range in format MMM DD, YYYY - MMM DD, YYYY.
The system shall display a calendar popup when the user clicks the Date Range field.
the Date Range field is enabled
the system shall display a calendar popup.
The system shall support navigation between months in the calendar picker.
navigate between months in the calendar
I can select dates from different months
the user clicks previous or next month navigation controls
the system shall display the corresponding month in the calendar picker.
The system shall restrict the maximum selectable date range to 31 days.
the system to restrict long date ranges
the user selects a start date
the system shall prevent selection beyond the maximum 31-day range.
The system shall display the selected duration in days below the date range field.
see the selected duration in days
I can verify the selected period
a valid date range is selected
the system shall display the selected duration in days below the Date Range field.
The system shall display an informational message: “Maximum 31 days allowed”.
see the maximum allowed range information
I understand the date selection limit
the Date Range field is displayed
the user views the date selection section
the system shall display the message “Maximum 31 days allowed”.
The system shall prevent users from selecting future dates.
I select only valid historical data
the user attempts to select a future date
the system shall prevent future date selection.
The system shall validate that the end date is greater than or equal to the start date.
the system to validate date order
the user selects start and end dates
the end date is earlier than the start date
the system shall display validation and prevent invalid date selection.
The system shall provide a Download CSV button for exporting raw RTSS data.
the Raw Data page is displayed
the user views the form actions
the system shall display a Download CSV button.

26.title: Disable Download Button Until Mandatory Fields Are Selected

content.text: The system shall keep the Download CSV button disabled until all mandatory fields are selected.
the Download CSV button disabled until required fields are completed
the user views the Download CSV button
the system shall keep the button disabled until all required fields are selected.
The system shall generate and download the raw data file in CSV format upon clicking the Download CSV button.
download raw data in CSV format
I can analyze exported data offline
the system shall generate and download the file in CSV format.

28.title: Export Data Based on Selected Filters

content.text: The system shall export raw data based on the selected MHE, Sensor, and Date Range.
exported data filtered by my selections
the user selects MHE, Sensor, and Date Range
the system shall export data corresponding to the selected filters.

29.title: Include Timestamped Sensor Records in CSV

content.text: The system shall include timestamped sensor records in the exported CSV file.
timestamped sensor data included in the export
the system shall include timestamped sensor records in the CSV file.
The system shall display an error message if no data is available for the selected criteria.
be informed when no records are available
no data exists for the selected criteria
the system shall display an appropriate no-data error message.
The system shall display popup Message “CSV file downloaded successfully” on right corner once the file is download.
I know the file was exported successfully
the CSV file is successfully downloaded
the system shall display popup message “CSV file downloaded successfully” at the right corner of the screen.
The system shall display an appropriate error message if CSV generation fails due to server or network issues.
be informed when CSV generation fails
I understand the issue and retry later
a server or network issue occurs during CSV generation
the system shall display an appropriate error message indicating CSV generation failure.
